name: Advanced Think Tank RSS Ingestion Pipeline

nodes.name: Fetch Sources
nodes.notes: Fetch all active RSS sources with full metadata from Supabase.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ id: $json.pinecone_id, content: $json.content, title: $json.title, source: $json.source, source_slug: $json.source_slug, published_at: $json.published_at, url: $json.url, article_id: $json.article_id, region: $json.region, topic_tags: $json.topic_tags }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ id: $json.article_id, source_id: $json.source_id, title: $json.title, url: $json.url, content: $json.content, excerpt: $json.excerpt, published_at: $json.published_at, embedding_id: $json.pinecone_id, source_name: $json.source_name, author: $json.author, language: $json.language, region: $json.region, topic_tags: $json.topic_tags, is_processed: $json.is_processed, image_url: $json.image_url || null }) }}

meta.description: V4 fixed pipeline: Proper source tracking through the entire pipeline. Fetches 29 RSS feeds from Supabase sources table. Parses RSS/Atom/RDF formats. Carries source_id through Parse RSS → Process Articles to prevent misattribution. Dual-writes to Pinecone and Supabase. Skips HTML responses from broken feeds.
